prompt: My Tailwind CSS v4 config isn't picking up my custom theme colors. I have a tailwind.config.ts but the classes like bg-brand-500 aren't generating. What changed in v4?

assertions.text: Ran ctx7 library to resolve Tailwind CSS library ID
Ran ctx7 docs with a resolved library ID
Explains Tailwind v4's CSS-first configuration change (moving away from tailwind.config.ts)
Provides a concrete fix showing how to define custom colors in v4
